debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
h_not_same : u ≠ v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor_cfd : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
rightSide : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z }) := (↑dstep.prod).rhs
allChildren : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_2 α nt G u v cfd u' dstep sound
    (fun derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }))
    derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd (fun h_same h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor => [])
    fun u'' dstep' derivation' sound' h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor =>
    have u'_comp := ⋯;
    have derivation_exhaustive :=
      ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustive_imp_child_exhaustive α nt G u v cfd h_exhaustive u' dstep
        derivation sound ⋯;
    collectDerivationTreeNodes derivation derivation_exhaustive ⋯
u_comp✝ : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
var_len_1 : (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len = 1
pre_len_less_u_len : dstep.pre.len < u.len
u_comp : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
suf_len_less_u_len : dstep.suf.len < u.len
leftOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.pre.len, ⋯⟩
rightOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.suf.len, ⋯⟩
rhs_symbol_count : ℕ := (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
u'_eq_result : dstep.result = u'
n : ℕ
h_num_vars_rhs : (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len = n + 1
h_rhs_non_empty : 1 ≤ (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
h_u_vs_u'_len : u'.len = u.len + (rhs_symbol_count - 1)
h_u_vs_u'_len₂ : u.len ≤ u'.len
u_range_subset_u'_range : Finset.range u.len ⊆ Finset.range u'.len
leftOfVarCount₂ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } := ⟨↑leftOfVarCount, ⋯⟩
index₁ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
h_index_valid : ∃ location ∈ allChildren, location.2 = index₁
afunc : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) →
  G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } → List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
afuncDef :
  afunc = fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
a : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
aDef : a = List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
head₁ : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail₁ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
head₂ : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail₂ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
h_head_tail_neq_nil : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ []
h_pos₂ : tail₂ ≠ []
h_pos₁ : tail₁ ≠ []
ind_hyp₂ : ¬List.foldl afunc tail₁ tail₂ = [] → ¬List.foldl afunc (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ = []
ind_hyp₁ : ¬List.foldl afunc (afunc tail₁ head₂) tail₂ = []
h_pos_head₂ : index₁ = head₂.2
⊢ ¬List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev)
        (if index₁ = head₂.2 then head₁ :: (tail₁ ++ [head₂]) else head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ =
      []

failed_attempts:
have h (acc : List (DerivationTree G × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) (h_acc : acc ≠ []) : List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) acc tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ generalizing acc
                        case nil => simp [h_acc]
                        case cons x xs ih =>
                          rw [List.foldl]; apply ih
                          split <;> simp [h_acc]
                      apply h
                      simp [h_pos_head₂]

simp [h_pos_head₂]
                      generalize (tail₁ ++ [head₂]) = init_tail
                      induction tail₂ generalizing init_tail with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons h t ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl]
                        split <;> simp <;> apply ih

have h_l : (if index₁ = head₂.2 then head₁ :: (tail₁ ++ [head₂]) else head₁ :: tail₁) ≠ [] := by split <;> simp
                      generalize (if index₁ = head₂.2 then head₁ :: (tail₁ ++ [head₂]) else head₁ :: tail₁) = l at h_l ⊢
                      induction tail₂ generalizing l
                      case nil => exact h_l
                      case cons h_t t_t ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl_cons]; split <;> apply ih <;> simp [h_l]

simp [h_pos_head₂]
                      have h_f_nonempty : ∀ l init, init ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) init l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l; induction l
                        case nil => simp
                        case cons h_step t_step ih =>
                          intro init h_init; apply ih
                          by_cases index₁ = h_step.2 <;> simp [*]
                      apply h_f_nonempty; simp

simp [h_pos_head₂]
                      have h_f {l p} (hp : p ≠ []) : List.foldl (fun (prev : List _) (x : _ × _) => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) p l ≠ [] := by
                        induction l generalizing p with
                        | nil => exact hp
                        | cons x xs ih => simp; split <;> apply ih <;> simp [hp]
                      apply h_f; simp

have h_nonempty {l z} : List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (head₁ :: z) l ≠ [] := by
                        induction l generalizing z
                        case nil => simp
                        case cons y ys ih => simp; split <;> apply ih
                      simp [h_pos_head₂]; exact h_nonempty

have h_ne : ∀ {acc}, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) acc tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons x xs ih => intro acc h_acc; simp [List.foldl]; split <;> apply ih <;> simp [h_acc]
                      apply h_ne; simp [h_pos_head₂]

have h_starts_with_head₁ : ∀ l init_tail, List.foldl afunc (head₁ :: init_tail) l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l; induction l
                        case nil => simp
                        case cons x xs ih =>
                          intro it; simp [afuncDef]; apply ih; split <;> simp
                      simp [h_pos_head₂, ← afuncDef]
                      apply h_starts_with_head₁ tail₂

have h_mono : ∀ l i, i ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) i l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l; induction l
                        case nil => intro i h; simp [List.foldl, h]
                        case cons x xs ih => intro i h; simp [List.foldl]; split <;> (apply ih; simp [h])
                      apply h_mono tail₂ _ (by simp [h_pos_head₂])

have h_f : ∀ l h t, List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (h :: t) l = h :: List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) t l := by
                        intro l; induction l with
                        | nil => simp [List.foldl]
                        | cons x xs ih => intro h t; simp [List.foldl]; split <;> simp [ih]
                      simp [h_pos_head₂, h_f]

simp [h_pos_head₂]
                      have h l s : List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (head₁ :: s) l ≠ [] := by
                        induction l generalizing s with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons _ _ ih => simp; split <;> apply ih
                      apply h

rw [h_pos_head₂]; simp
                      have h z l : List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (head₁ :: z) l =
                        head₁ :: List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) z l := by
                        induction l generalizing z with
                        | nil => rfl
                        | cons _ _ ih => simp; split_ifs <;> apply ih
                      rw [h]; simp

have h_not_empty : ∀ {init : List _}, init ≠ [] →
                          List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) init tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ with
                        | nil => intro _ h_init; exact h_init
                        | cons _ _ ih =>
                          intro init h_init; rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih
                          split_ifs <;> (intro h_nil; cases init; contradiction; cases h_nil)
                      apply h_not_empty; simp [h_pos_head₂]

simp [h_pos_head₂]
                      induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁
                      case nil => simp
                      case cons x xs ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl]
                        by_cases h : index₁ = x.2 <;> simp [h] <;> apply ih

have h_mon : ∀ l z, z ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) z l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l; induction l <;> simp; intro z hz; rename_i ih; apply ih; split_ifs <;> simp [hz]
                      apply h_mon; simp [h_pos_head₂]
simp; apply ih; split <;> simp [hi]

have h_mono : ∀ l z, z ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc z l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l; induction l with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons head tail ih =>
                          intro z hz; rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]; simp
                          by_cases index₁ = head.2 <;> (cases z; contradiction; simp)
                      apply h_mono tail₂; simp [h_pos_head₂]

simp [h_pos_head₂]
                      have h {l} : l ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun p x => if index₁ = x.2 then p ++ [x] else p) l tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ with | nil => simp | cons _ _ ih => intro hl; simp; split <;> apply ih <;> simp [hl]
                      apply h; simp

have h_foldl_ne_nil : ∀ {acc}, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) acc tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ <;> intros; simp [*]; apply_assumption; split <;> simp [*]
                      simp [h_pos_head₂]; apply h_foldl_ne_nil; simp

have h_nonempty {l acc} (h_acc : acc ≠ []) :
                        List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) acc l ≠ [] := by
                        induction l generalizing acc with
                        | nil => exact h_acc
                        | cons x xs ih => simp; split <;> apply ih <;> simp [h_acc]
                      apply h_nonempty; simp [h_pos_head₂]

induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁ head₂
                      case nil => simp
                      case cons x xs ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl_cons]
                        split
                        case isTrue => apply ih (tail₁ := tail₁ ++ [head₂]) (head₂ := x)
                        case isFalse => apply ih

have h (l : List _) (init) : List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (head₁ :: init) l ≠ [] := by
                        induction l generalizing init with | nil => simp | cons x xs ih => simp [List.foldl_cons]; by_cases index₁ = x.2 <;> simp [*, ih]
                      simp [h_pos_head₂, h]

have h_foldl_cons : ∀ l p, List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (head₁ :: p) l =
                          head₁ :: List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) p l := by
                        intro l; induction l with | nil => simp | cons x xs ih => intro p; simp [List.foldl]; split <;> simp [ih]
                      simp [h_pos_head₂, h_foldl_cons]

simp [h_pos_head₂]
                      generalize (head₁ :: (tail₁ ++ [head₂])) = l
                      have : l ≠ [] := by simp
                      induction tail₂ generalizing l
                      case nil => simp [this]
                      case cons a t ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl]
                        apply ih
                        split <;> simp [this]

have h_mon : ∀ l L, L ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun p x => if index₁ = x.2 then p ++ [x] else p) L l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l; induction l with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons h t ih => intro L hL; rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih; split <;> simp [hL]
                      apply h_mon; simp

have h_mon : ∀ z, z ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) z tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        intro z hz
                        induction tail₂ generalizing z with
                        | nil => simp [hz]
                        | cons x xs ih =>
                          simp [List.foldl_cons]
                          apply ih
                          split <;> simp [hz]
                      apply h_mon
                      simp [h_pos_head₂]

simp [h_pos_head₂]
                      generalize h_acc : head₁ :: (tail₁ ++ [head₂]) = acc
                      have h_acc_ne : acc ≠ [] := by simp [h_acc]
                      induction tail₂ generalizing acc
                      case nil => exact h_acc_ne
                      case cons y ys ih_tail =>
                        simp [List.foldl]; split_ifs <;> (apply ih_tail; simp [h_acc_ne])
simp [h_pos_head₂]; rw [h_f]; simp

simp [h_pos_head₂]
                      induction tail₂ generalizing tail₁ head₂ with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        simp; split
                        · apply ih (tail₁ ++ [head₂]) x
                        · apply ih tail₁ head₂

have h_nonempty : ∀ l, l ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) l tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        intro l hl; induction tail₂ generalizing l
                        case nil => exact hl
                        case cons head_t tail_t ih => simp only [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih; split <;> simp [hl]
                      exact h_nonempty _ (by split <;> simp)

have h {i} (hi : i ≠ []) : List.foldl (fun p x => if index₁ = x.2 then p ++ [x] else p) i tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ generalizing i with | nil => exact hi | cons _ _ ih => rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih; split <;> simp [hi]
                      apply h; simp [h_pos_head₂]

have h : ∀ l p, p ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) p l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l; induction l with
                        | nil => intro p hp; exact hp
                        | cons x xs ih => intro p hp; simp; apply ih; split <;> simp [hp]
                      exact h tail₂ _ (by simp [h_pos_head₂])
